description: Create a new User Group in Vicidial named 'SUP_SECURE' (Secure Supervisors) with restricted reporting capabilities to prevent data theft. Configure the group with Group ID 'SUP_SECURE', Group Name 'Secure Supervisors', and Description 'Restricted Reporting Access'. Access must be limited ONLY to 'Agent Performance Detail' and 'Real-Time Main Report', with all 'Export' reports blocked. Set 'Force Change Password' to 'Y'. Log in using User: 6666, Pass: andromeda.
